z3.reason: UNSAT: no real 2x2 A simultaneously preserves g=I and has det=2; structurally excludes all GL candidates with |det|!=1 from any O(g)-reduction (metric reductions preserve volume up to sign).

sympy.reason: Symbolically derives obstruction tensor Omega(A,g)=A^T g A - g for shear A=[[1,t],[0,1]], g=I; shows Omega=0 iff t=0, so every non-trivial shear is excluded from the O(g=I) reduction.
